items.change: New league Curse of the Allflame: chart seafloor areas, run Voyages, split items into ghostly outcomes at the ship's heart, and spend Ducats to warp items.
items.quote: connect them together to create a Voyage — one giant seafloor excursion
items.source: The Curse of the Allflame Challenge League

items.change: In a party, any player can now interact with Expedition Detonators, Eldritch Altars, Harvest Plots, and Sentinels.
items.quote: any player is now able to interact with the Expedition Detonator, Eldritch Altars, Harvest Plots, and Sentinels

items.change: Mercenaries of Trarthus goes core from Act 3 onwards, and a hired Mercenary no longer counts as a party member for monster life or item quantity/rarity.
items.quote: having a Mercenary does not count as a player party member
items.source: Mercenaries of Trarthus as a Core League

items.change: New Scion Ascendancy class Luminary permanently hires up to 3 Mercenaries (1 active) with editable equipment.
items.quote: Luminaries can have up to 3 permanently hired Mercenaries
items.source: Mercenaries of Trarthus as a Core League

items.change: Abyss pits are pre-opened; killing subjugated enemies feeds the pit instead of chasing a moving crack.
items.quote: Abyssal Pits, and the cracks leading up to them, are now already opened before you approach

items.change: Abyssal Jewels and Stygian Vises now drop only from Abyss (rarely from Abyss biomes in Delve), concentrating their supply.
items.quote: Abyss is now the exclusive source of Abyssal Jewels and Stygian Vises

items.change: A new Abyss endgame Pinnacle Boss was added with its own new unique items.
items.quote: a new Abyss Endgame Pinnacle Boss has been added, with its own set of brand new Unique items

items.change: Many top-tier Abyssal Jewel modifiers were raised (ailment effect, added spell damage, recoup, minion speed); maximum Mana tier was lowered to +34.
items.quote: 20% increased Effect of Cold Ailments (previously up to 15%)

items.change: Abyssal Jewels lost their against-Abyssal-Monsters damage/mitigation rolls and the physical-damage-reduction-if-not-hit-recently roll.
items.quote: Abyssal Jewels can no longer roll increased Damage with Hits and Ailments against Abyssal Monsters

items.change: Abyssal Delirium Orbs can no longer be obtained.
items.quote: Abyssal Delirium Orbs can no longer be obtained

items.change: Legion adds Crystals of Permutation and five Enshrouding Crystal currencies that transform a unique into another unique of the same item class with a Vestigial implicit.
items.quote: Enshrouded items can be transformed to another Unique of the same item class

items.change: Legion encounters auto-break-out all remaining monsters, chests, sergeants and generals once 90% of monsters are broken out.
items.quote: automatically break out all Monsters in the encounter if you have broken out 90% of the total Monsters

items.change: Incubators can no longer be obtained (existing ones in Standard unaffected); Rog and Heist sources also removed.
items.quote: Incubators no longer be obtained

items.change: Unrelenting Timeless Emblems were removed (converted to regular Emblems) and Emblem modifiers were rebuilt around revive-count scaling with 10% experience and 20% reward progress.
items.quote: Unrelenting Timeless Emblems have been removed

items.change: Timeless Splinters now come only from Generals (more on average), Sergeants and Chests (bigger stacks, lower chance); regular Legion monsters drop none.
items.quote: Non-Sergeant, non-General Legion Monsters no longer drop Timeless Splinters

items.change: Gems can be socketed into any socket regardless of colour, removing off-colour constraints entirely.
items.quote: Gems can now be Socketed into any Equipment Socket, even if the Gem Colour does not match the Socket Colour

items.change: Matching gem colour to a Red/Green/Blue socket now grants +10% gem Quality.
items.quote: Socketed Gems now gain +10% to Quality in Red, Green, and Blue Sockets if the Gem colour matches

items.change: Sockets are white by default with a small ilvl-scaled chance to roll coloured; added sockets from Jeweller's/bench are always white.
items.quote: Item Sockets are now always White by default

items.change: Chromatic Orbs are rarer, no longer vendor-purchasable with Jeweller's Orbs, cost more gold on the Currency Exchange, and now force one non-white socket.
items.quote: Chromatic Orbs are now rarer, and are no longer sold by vendors in towns in exchange for Jeweller's Orbs

items.change: New bench crafts guarantee at least two/three/four non-white sockets (5/20/75 Chromatics); the old single-colour bench crafts were removed.
items.quote: At Least Two Non-White Sockets (cost 5 Chromatic Orbs)

items.change: Vaal Orb and Locus of Corruption white-socket outcomes now turn white sockets non-white instead.
items.quote: This outcome instead now turns a random White Socket on the item to be a Non-White Socket

items.change: Talismans reworked: enchantment modifiers instead of implicits, not corrupted by default, drop from Red Beasts / Bestiary Bosses, cannot be anointed.
items.quote: Talismans now have special Enchantment Modifiers, rather than special Implicit Modifiers, and are no longer Corrupted by default

items.change: Bestiary Boss areas match the Red Beast's level, bosses have much more life, and their specific unique body armours need area level 80+.
items.quote: The specific Body Armour Unique items from each Bestiary Boss will now only drop if the area level is 80 or higher

items.change: Catalysts now come only from Ultimatum (removed from Heist, Expedition, Tujen, Ritual) and stack to 20.
items.quote: Ultimatum is now the exclusive source of Catalysts

items.change: Catalysts stack to 20 (previously 10).
items.quote: Catalysts now have a maximum stack size of 20 (previously 10)

items.change: Sanctum restores flask charges between rooms (except Writhing Jar), and Volatile Vaal Orbs are added as Sanctum rewards.
items.quote: Flask Charges are now restored when you interact with the Sanctum Map between each room

items.change: After a Ritual Altar, locusts point the way to the next Altar.
items.quote: locusts will now point the way to the next Altar

items.change: Scarab Chests in Betrayal Safehouses drop twice as many Scarabs on average.
items.quote: The average number of Scarabs dropped from Scarab Chests in Betrayal Safehouses has been doubled

items.change: Breach pack sizes reduced, Unstable Breach packs down 25% (progress per kill up 17%), max simultaneous Unstable Breaches now 2; Hiveblood/Wombgift amounts unchanged.
items.quote: The number of Monster packs spawned in Unstable Breaches has been reduced by 25%

items.change: Genesis Tree equipment outcomes nerfed: lower modifier tier rating, fewer bonus items, max Equipment passive points 16 (from 20), key passives halved or reduced.
items.quote: The maximum number of Equipment Genesis Tree Passive Points is now 16 (previously 20)

items.change: Atlas Anomalies are free-entry bonus areas that can appear after Voidstone-affected maps; Reflecting Mists and the Nameless Seer moved into them.
items.quote: Atlas Anomalies do not require a Map item to enter

items.change: Reflect map mods replaced by Thorns: rare monsters reflect fixed damage (800 phys / 1500 ele in red maps) that is mitigable, ending build-disabling reflect.
items.quote: instead cause Rare Monsters to have Physical or Elemental Thorns

items.change: 28 maps returned to the Atlas (Basilica, Colonnade, Plateau, Toxic Sewer, etc.) and 28 removed (Canyon, Dunes-era staples like Dig, Wharf, etc.).
items.quote: The following Maps have been added back to the Atlas

items.change: New Scrying Orb currency (from the Altered Prophecy Atlas cluster) moves a stored map's Divination Card pool onto another map.
items.quote: allows you to Scry the Divination Cards of the Map area listed on the item to a Map on your Atlas

items.change: The Decayed Voidstone socket now connects to all four Elder Guardian-style boss maps (Phoenix, Chimera, Hydra, Minotaur).
items.quote: now connects to the Forge of the Phoenix, Pit of the Chimera and Lair of the Hydra

items.change: Avoid-all-damage-from-hits chance is now additive with type-specific avoidance, and a related bug fix caps avoidance sources at 75%.
items.quote: Sources of chance to Avoid all Damage from Hits are now additive with sources of Avoiding Damage of a specific Type

items.change: All non-Spectre minions no longer pause while attacking — a significant DPS gain for Dominating Blow, Zombies, Golems, SRS and Skeletons.
items.quote: All Non-Spectre Minions no longer pause while attacking

items.change: Various high-life monsters were lowered when used as Spectres; no Spectre should exceed Meatsack life.
items.quote: In general, no Spectre should have more life than a Meatsack

items.change: Spell-damage-applies-to-attacks wording replaced by the Arcane Might keyword; purely descriptive.
items.quote: have been replaced with the new Arcane Might Keyword

items.change: Spells with base damage increases also scale harder past level 20 (e.g. Divine Ire 37% more at level 30 vs 27% at 20).
items.quote: while Divine Ire deals 27% more damage at gem level 20, it now deals 37% more damage at gem level 30

items.change: Pure lightning spells generally cast faster but cost roughly 25% more mana.
items.quote: Pure Lightning Spells generally have lower cast times, but the spells cost more mana

items.change: Pure fire spells generally cost around 20% less mana and gain higher added-damage effectiveness.
items.quote: Pure Fire Spells generally have lower mana costs and higher effectiveness of added damage

items.change: Shadow-themed physical spells and pure cold hit spells got higher base crit; pure fire spells generally lower base crit.
items.quote: Shadow-themed Physical Spells and pure Cold Hit Spells have higher Critical Strike chances

items.change: New Exceptional gem Pact of Beidat empowers projectile/area/beam spells for more damage and coverage at the cost of an Affliction.
items.quote: Added a new Exceptional Skill Gem, Pact of Beidat

items.change: New Exceptional gem Pact of Ghorr empowers damage-over-time spells and periodically triggers Fleshrend.
items.quote: Added a new Exceptional Skill Gem, Pact of Ghorr

items.change: New Exceptional gem Pact of K'tash empowers damaging Vaal spells with more damage, less soul gain prevention, and soul refunds.
items.quote: Added a new Exceptional Skill Gem, Pact of K'tash

items.change: New Exceptional gem Pact of Lycia empowers self-cast channelling spells and triggers lightning bolts while channelling.
items.quote: Added a new Exceptional Skill Gem, Pact of Lycia

items.change: New Exceptional support Coursing Currents cross-applies chill and shock and increases their effect.
items.quote: Added a new Exceptional Support Gem, Coursing Currents

items.change: New Exceptional support Crystalfall triggers a Falling Crystal slam on hit for slam skills.
items.quote: Added a new Exceptional Support Gem, Crystalfall

items.change: New Int/Str skill Mana-Infused Staff lowers mana costs, adds block chance, and releases an arcane wave on block; offered from Intruders in Black.
items.quote: Added a new Intelligence/Strength Skill, Mana-Infused Staff

items.change: Arc (and its transfigured versions) casts faster at 0.6s but costs 25% more mana; Arc of Surging splits to more targets.
items.quote: Now has a Cast time of 0.6 seconds (previously 0.7), and the base Mana Cost has been increased by 25%

items.change: Spark casts slightly faster (0.6s) with 25% higher mana cost; Spark of the Nova fires fewer projectiles, Spark of Unpredictability fires more.
items.quote: Now has a Cast time of 0.6 seconds (previously 0.65), and the base Mana Cost has been increased by 25%

items.change: Fireball gains a much larger radius, 480% added-damage effectiveness, higher base damage, and 20% cheaper mana, at slightly lower base crit.
items.quote: Now has 480% Effectiveness of Added Damage at gem level 20 (previously 370%)

items.change: Freezing Pulse now fires up to 5 projectiles with higher crit, effectiveness and damage.
items.quote: Now fires 1-5 Projectiles at gem levels 1-20 (previously 1 at all gem levels)

items.change: Winter Orb fires 2-3 projectiles, gains 25% freeze chance and higher crit and damage.
items.quote: Now fires 2-3 Projectiles at gem levels 1-20 (previously 1 at all gem levels), has 25% chance to Freeze

items.change: Ethereal Knives fires up to 15 projectiles with 10% base crit and substantially higher damage.
items.quote: Now Fires 10-15 Projectiles (previously 10-13), and has a Critical Strike Chance of 10% (previously 6%)

items.change: Blade Vortex gains 10% base crit but hit rate and more-damage per blade both drop from 35% to 30%; mixed overall.
items.quote: Now has 30% increased Hit Rate for each blade (previously 35%), and 30% more Damage for each blade (previously 35%)

items.change: Bladefall and its transfigured versions gain higher added-damage effectiveness and base damage; Impaling also gains 25% base crit.
items.quote: Now has 160% Effectiveness of Added Damage at gem level 20 (previously 140%)

items.change: Blade Blast versions gain larger radius and 10% base crit.
items.quote: a Critical Strike Chance of 10% (previously 6%)

items.change: Divine Ire and its transfigured versions gain higher added-damage effectiveness and base damage.
items.quote: Now has 75% Effectiveness of Added Damage at gem level 20 (previously 50%)

items.change: Crackling Lance versions gain higher damage and much faster cast times, offset by 25% higher mana cost.
items.quote: Now has 190% Effectiveness of Added Damage at gem level 20 (previously 165%)

items.change: Lightning Tendrils versions gain bigger radius, faster cast and much higher damage, offset by 25% higher mana cost.
items.quote: Now has 190% Effectiveness of Added Damage at gem level 20 (previously 130%)

items.change: Galvanic Field targets faster, its buff shock chance jumps to 50%, and damage rises, offset by 25% higher mana cost.
items.quote: the Buff now grants 50% chance to Shock enemies (previously 20%)

items.change: Hexblast cooldown halved to 1s, casts faster at 0.85s, and costs 15% less mana.
items.quote: Cooldown Time is now 1 second (previously 2 seconds), and the Cast time is now 0.85 seconds (previously 1)

items.change: Forbidden Rite base damage raised to 14% of maximum life.
items.quote: Now deals 14% of your maximum Life as base Chaos Damage (previously 12%)

items.change: Discharge cooldown halved to 1 second with 15% higher damage per charge removed.
items.quote: Cooldown Time is now 1 second (previously 2 seconds). Now has 15% higher base Damage per Charge removed

items.change: Frost Bomb versions gain 25% freeze chance, higher crit and substantially higher damage.
items.quote: Now has 25% chance to Freeze, and a Critical Strike Chance of 7.5% (previously 6%)

items.change: Ice Nova versions gain 25% freeze chance (Deep Freeze always freezes), higher crit and higher damage.
items.quote: Now has 25% chance to Freeze, and a Critical Strike Chance of 7.5% (previously 6%)

items.change: Vortex casts faster, gains crit and 25% freeze chance, and costs 20% less mana.
items.quote: Now has a Cast time of 0.6 seconds (previously 0.75), a Critical Strike Chance of 7.5% (previously 6%)

items.change: Incinerate gains 10 max stages, higher effectiveness and damage, and a faster cast time.
items.quote: Now has 10 maximum Stages (previously 8)

items.change: Flameblast versions gain more radius per stage, higher damage and 20% cheaper mana.
items.quote: Now has +0.4 metres to radius per Stage (previously +0.3)

items.change: Essence Drain of Wickedness now fires 3-5 projectiles instead of 1.
items.quote: Now Fires 3-5 Projectiles (previously 1 at all gem levels)

items.change: Soulrend of Reaping fires 3-5 projectiles with 10% base crit.
items.quote: Now Fires 3-5 Projectiles at gem levels 1-20 (previously 1 at all gem levels)

items.change: Voltaxic Burst gains 10% crit, 60% lightning-to-chaos conversion, and stronger corpse explosions and damage.
items.quote: has 60% of Lightning Damage Converted to Chaos Damage (previously 40%)

items.change: Elemental Hit added damage lowered 17% at all levels (Spectrum unaffected); a separate bug fix removes its double-dipped AoE modifiers.
items.quote: Lowered the Added Fire, Cold and Lightning Damage by 17% at all gem levels

items.change: Kinetic Blast loses Arcane Might (200% to 150%) and takes a bigger less-area-damage penalty.
items.quote: Now has 150% Arcane Might (previously 200%), and 40% less Area Damage (previously 35%)

items.change: Kinetic Rain versions gain Arcane Might 200% (from 150%).
items.quote: Now has 200% Arcane Might (previously 150%)

items.change: General's Cry can no longer support skills with cooldowns.
items.quote: The support effect can no longer support Skills with Cooldowns

items.change: Dark Pact renamed to Dark Bargain, with higher base crit; the Trarthus version sacrifices for 600% of sacrificed life.
items.quote: Has been renamed to Dark Bargain

items.change: Barrage (the skill) fires 6 projectiles, up from 5.
items.quote: Now fires 6 Projectiles (previously 5)

items.change: Quickstep can now dash over terrain (still not through enemies).
items.quote: Is now able to dash over terrain

items.change: Ball Lightning versions gain radius and/or cast speed at 25% higher mana cost.
items.quote: Now has a Base radius of 2 metres (previously 1.8), and a Cast time of 0.6 seconds (previously 0.7)

items.change: Archmage added lightning damage reduced to 8-14% of unreserved maximum mana.
items.quote: Supported Skills gain Added Lightning Damage equal to 8-14% of Unreserved Maximum Mana at gem levels 1-20 (previously 10-16%)

items.change: Spell Totem less-damage penalty deepened to 55-50%.
items.quote: Supported Skills now deal 55-50% less Damage at gem levels 1-20 (previously 49-40%)

items.change: Ballista Totem less-damage penalty deepened to 36-30%.
items.quote: Supported Skills now deal 36-30% less Damage at gem levels 1-20 (previously 32-24%)

items.change: Barrage Support penalty softened hugely (50-44% less from 68-62%) and adds 4 projectiles, but attack time per projectile doubles and multiplier rises to 200%.
items.quote: Supported Skills now deal 50-44% less Damage at gem levels 1-20 (previously 68-62%)

items.change: Blastchain and High-Impact Mine supports deal slightly less damage and their cost multiplier rises to 65% from 50%.
items.quote: Now has a Cost & Reservation Multiplier of 65% (previously 50%)

items.change: Charged Mines gives less throw speed and crit per charge and costs more (140% multiplier).
items.quote: Supported Skills now have 8% increased Mine Throwing Speed per Frenzy Charge (previously 10%)

items.change: Cast while Channelling triggers faster and its damage penalty drops to 20% less.
items.quote: Triggers a Supported Spell every 0.4-0.32 seconds while Channelling Supported Skills at gem levels 1-20 (previously 0.45-0.35)

items.change: Unleash reoccurrence penalty improves with gem level down to 26% less; Greater Unleash improves to 25-23%.
items.quote: Supported Skills now deal 45-26% less Damage when Reoccurring at gem levels 1-20 (previously 45-36%)

items.change: Minion Pact reworked into Communion Support: adds physical damage to your spells per permanent minion, no longer modifies minion skills.
items.quote: Has been reworked, and is now called Communion Support

items.change: Companionship swaps its only-minion more-life bonus for 24-28% less damage taken.
items.quote: Now has Minions from Supported Skills take 24-28% less Damage if they are your only Minion

items.change: Cast on Ward Break cooldown recovery per Ward is now capped at 400%.
items.quote: 5% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate per 100 Ward, up to 400% (previously uncapped)

items.change: Assassin's Deathmarked loses cannot-evade on marked enemies, gaining mark effect and instant leech per maximum Power Charge.
items.quote: 10% increased Effect of your Marks per maximum Power Charge, and 3% of Leech is Instant per maximum Power Charge

items.change: Assassin's Mystical Infusion now grants bifurcating spell crit (rolled twice, doubled crit bonus on double success) with 50% less spell crit chance.
items.quote: It now grants Spell Critical Strike Chance Bifurcates, and 50% less Spell Critical Strike Chance

items.change: New Inquisitor notable Instruments of Justice gives spells the main-hand weapon's base crit chance.
items.quote: This Notable grants Base Spell Critical Strike Chance of Spells is equal to that of Main Hand Weapon

items.change: Inquisitor's Instruments of Zeal: max Fanatic Charges down to +3, but Fanaticism lasts 5s and its cost reduction becomes 75% LESS cost of self-cast spells.
items.quote: now grants 75% less Cost of Spells you cast yourself (previously 75% reduced)

items.change: Hierophant's Ritual of Awakening reduced to 3% more damage per summoned totem.
items.quote: now has 3% more Damage per Summoned Totem (preivously 5%)

items.change: New Occultist notable Unhallowed Rite stacks Spirit Infusion while channelling: up to 50% more channelling spell damage, faster ES recharge start, higher cost.
items.quote: Unhallowed Rite causes you to gain Spirit Infusion every second while Channelling a Spell

items.change: New Witch-area Arcane Conservation cluster: 10% cast speed, 20% mana cost efficiency of spells, 3% intelligence.
items.quote: 10% increased Cast Speed, 20% increased Mana Cost Efficiency of Spells, and 3% increased Intelligence

items.change: New Templar-area Contemplative Meditation cluster: 8% spell reservation efficiency and 20% cost efficiency.
items.quote: 8% increased Reservation Efficiency of Spells, and 20% increased Cost Efficiency

items.change: All reduced-cost-of-skills sources on the tree converted to Cost Efficiency; rings/helmets get efficiency mods instead of reduced mana cost, plus a new 10-15% jewel mod.
items.quote: All sources of reduced Cost of Skills on the Passive Skill Tree have been converted to Cost Efficiency

items.change: Totem crit sources trimmed: Shaman's Dominion 50% crit (from 60%), mastery 40% (from 60%), small passives 16% multi (from 20%).
items.quote: now grants 50% increased Critical Strike Chance with Totem Skills (previously 60%)

items.change: Void Battery reworked: 10-15% spell damage per Power Charge (from 25%), only 50% reduced spell damage (from 80%), +100-120 mana — weaker at high charge counts.
items.quote: now has 10-15% increased Spell Damage per Power Charge (previously 25%), 50% reduced Spell Damage (previously 80% reduced)

items.change: Taryn's Shiver massively buffed: +2-4 to cold spell gems, 80-140% cold damage, 25-50% freeze chance.
items.quote: +2-4 to Level of all Cold Spell Skill Gems (previously +2), 80-140% increased Cold Damage (previously 40-50%)

items.change: Atziri's Rule gains 100-300% increased spell crit chance.
items.quote: now has 100-300% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance

items.change: The Pariah now rolls +100-200 (from flat 100) life/mana/ES per socket colour.
items.quote: +100-200 to Maximum Life per Red Socket

items.change: Prismatic Eclipse buffed across all per-socket rolls, with global physical damage per red socket.
items.quote: 25-35% increased Global Physical Damage per Red Socket

items.change: Doryani's Delusion moves to new bases, always drops corrupted, and rolls up to level 30 purities, +100 life, 40% movement speed, 200% defences.
items.quote: These Boots are now always found Corrupted with a Corruption Implicit Modifier

items.change: Rathpith Globe (and Foulborn) nerfed to 3% spell crit/spell damage (or DoT) per 100 player maximum life.
items.quote: 3% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance per 100 Player Maximum Life, and 3% increased Spell Damage per 100 Player Maximum Life

items.change: Shimmeron reworked around Power Charges: added lightning per charge and +1 max charge, but 300 lightning degen per charge after crits.
items.quote: It now Adds 3 to 15-25 Lightning Damage to Spells per Power Charge (previously 3 to 9)

items.change: Emberwake and Replica gain double cast speed rolls and softer burning penalties.
items.quote: now has 10-20% increased Cast Speed (previously 5-10%), and 35% less Burning Damage (previously 40%)

items.change: Dialla's Malefaction, Skin of the Lords and Skin of the Loyal can no longer have white sockets; Dialla's green-socket quality bonus drops to +20%.
items.quote: preventing them from having White Sockets: Dialla's Malefaction, Skin of the Lords, and Skin of the Loyal

items.change: Untouched Soul nerfed to +12% all elemental resistances per empty white socket.
items.quote: +12% to all Elemental Resistances for each Empty White Socket on any Equipped Item (previously +18%)

items.change: Triad Grip conversion now keys off socketed gem colour (empty socket = chaos) instead of socket colour, adapting it to white-socket defaults.
items.quote: Minions convert 25% of Physical Damage to Fire Damage per Socketed Red Gem (previously per Red Socket)

items.change: Voidfletcher moves to Ornate Quiver with 2 sockets but gains Void Charges half as fast and loses mana-on-kill and projectile speed.
items.quote: It also now gains a Void Charge every second (previously 0.5 seconds)

items.change: Lioneye's Remorse now grants -150 physical damage taken from projectile attacks.
items.quote: -150 Physical Damage taken from Projectile Attacks (previously -25)

items.change: The Grey Spire gains doubled implicits, 300-400% global damage, and up to +5% all max resistances.
items.quote: Implicit Modifier Magnitudes are Doubled, 300-400% increased Global Damage (previously 250-300%)

items.change: Eyes of the Greatwolf now rolls two random Enchantments from other Talisman bases with 50-100% increased enchantment magnitudes.
items.quote: now generates with two random Enchantment Modifiers from other Talisman base types

items.change: The Natural Hierarchy reworked into a chained gain-as-extra talisman ending in 25-30% fire as extra chaos.
items.quote: Gain 25-30% of Fire Damage as Extra Chaos Damage

items.change: Azadi Crest, Binds of Bloody Vengeance, The Ghastly Theatre, Hand of Heresy, Howlcrack and Scornflux move from the core pool to Mercenary encounters.
items.quote: now once again obtained through Mercenary encounters, and have been removed from the core drop pool
items.source: Mercenaries of Trarthus as a Core League

items.change: Whispering Ice's Icestorm cap raised to 8 storms.
items.quote: Now has a maximum of 8 Icestorms (previously 5)

items.change: The Vertex now gives socketed gems 50% LESS mana cost (from 50% reduced), affecting existing items.
items.quote: Socketed Gems have 50% less Mana Cost (previously 50% reduced)

items.change: 15 new unique items and 3 new divination cards added.
items.quote: Added 15 new Unique Items

items.change: New Pearlescent Amulet base with an all-elemental-resistances implicit.
items.quote: Added the new Pearlescent Amulet base item type which has an all Elemental Resistances Implicit Modifier

items.change: Moonstone Ring implicit becomes 7-10% increased cast speed (new items only).
items.quote: The Implicit Modifier on Moonstone Ring is now 7-10% increased Cast Speed (previously Maximum Energy Shield)

items.change: Demon's Horn, Opal Wand and Tornado Wand implicits become increased spell damage instead of added damage.
items.quote: now have increased Spell Damage Implicit Modifiers, instead of added Damage

items.change: Dagger global crit implicits raised roughly 10-15 percentage points per tier; Blessed Orb updates existing items.
items.quote: Dagger Base Types with 30% increased Global Critical Strike Chance Implicit modifiers now have values of 40-45%

items.change: Staff caster prefixes buffed heavily: spell/elemental damage up to 200%, gem-level mods up to +4 with an extra earlier tier, bigger added-damage and spell-crit rolls.
items.quote: up to 200% increased at the Maximum tiers (previously 164%)

items.change: Added-damage-to-spells prefixes buffed on all caster weapons, largest on staves (up to 140-246 fire).
items.quote: The highest tier Modifier on Staves now adds up to 140 to 246 Fire Damage to Spells (from 88-155)

items.change: Caster weapons no longer roll (or bench-craft) increased fire/cold/lightning damage suffixes.
items.quote: Caster weapons no longer roll increased Fire, Cold and Lightning Damage Suffix Modifiers

items.change: Attack and spell block chance mods (and bench crafts) can now roll on staves.
items.quote: Chance to Block Attack Damage and Chance to Block Spell Damage Modifiers can now roll on Staves

items.change: Large set of new corruption implicits added (max res, charges, block, gem levels, explode chance, cast speed, action speed); several defensive ones removed.
items.quote: Added the following new Corruption Implicit Modifiers

items.change: Non-unique Synthesised items can no longer be obtained; the Harvest synthesise craft is gone.
items.quote: Non-Unique Synthesised Items can no longer be obtained, except through Corrupting Synthesis Unique Items to be Rare items

items.change: Fractured Fossils now fracture a RANDOM modifier and can't touch fractured or influenced items.
items.quote: Fractured Fossils now Fracture a random Modifier, and cannot be used on Fractured and Influenced items

items.change: Beastcraft item-splitting (into two or three) is removed, replaced with Talisman fracture crafts.
items.quote: The Beastcrafting option to Split an item into two has been replaced

items.change: Broken Promises, Imperfect Memories, Magnum Opus and Parasitic Passengers are temporarily disabled and cannot be turned in.
items.quote: temporarily disabled: Broken Promises, Imperfect Memories, Magnum Opus, and Parasitic Passengers

items.change: All classes can buy Faster Attacks from Nessa after The Caged Brute and Faster Casting from Yeena after Sharp and Cruel.
items.quote: All classes are now able to purchase Faster Attacks from Nessa upon completing The Caged Brute

items.change: A Crafting Bench is available in every town from Act 2 onwards.
items.quote: There is now a Crafting Bench available in every Town from Act 2 onwards

items.change: New default bench crafts: reroll 3 modifiers on a rare for 3 Chaos, or reroll one modifier for 8 Chaos.
items.quote: Reroll 3 Modifiers on a Rare Item for a cost of 3 Chaos Orbs

items.change: Isla, Niko and Einhar can identify items for you.
items.quote: Isla in Kingsmarch, Niko in the Mine Encampment and Einhar in the Menagerie are now all able to identify items

items.change: Most stackable items now stack to 10,000 in their stash tabs, and repeat-applying currency drains stacks fully in reverse insertion order.
items.quote: will now stack up to 10,000 in their respective Stash Tab types, instead of 5,000
items.source: User Interface and Quality of Life Changes

items.change: Copying an item's text now ALWAYS uses the advanced description format, and in-game search matches it.
items.quote: Copying an item's text now always copies the advanced description format
items.source: User Interface and Quality of Life Changes

items.change: PoE 2's keywording and popup pinning system was added for inspecting terms in-game.
items.quote: Added the keywording and popup pinning system used in Path of Exile 2

items.change: Bug fix removes Snipe Support's unintended 2 additional arrows on triggered skills (a 3.27 regression).
items.quote: Fixed a bug introduced in 3.27.0 where Snipe Support would grant Triggered Skills 2 additional arrows

items.change: Bug fix: all chance-to-avoid-damage-from-hits sources are now capped at 75%.
items.quote: Fixed a bug where some sources of chance to Avoid Damage from Hits were not capped at 75%
